summary: A staunchly pro-American NATO member emerging from decades of brutal communist isolation, now an EU candidate banking on tourism, energy, and ties to the large ethnic-Albanian diaspora.

history.detail: Albania becomes a state as Ottoman rule in Europe collapses.
Enver Hoxha installs one of the world's most isolated regimes.
The Hoxhaist regime collapses; chaotic transition begins.
Mass financial fraud sparks near civil war and state breakdown.
Albania becomes a full member of the alliance.
Formal negotiations to join the European Union begin.

key_doctrines: Support for Kosovo and Albanians abroad

tech_startups.vc_ecosystem: Small and emerging; outsourcing and tourism tech

resources.oil_gas: Modest onshore oil; the TAP gas pipeline crosses the country
resources.water: Abundant; nearly all electricity from hydropower

follow_the_money.detail: Rapidly growing Adriatic/Ionian tourism is a major FX earner
The Trans Adriatic Pipeline brings transit revenue and EU energy relevance
The diaspora in Italy, Greece and the US sends home significant funds

theories_disputed.detail: Albania cut ties with Iran in 2022 after attacks blamed on Tehran over the MEK exile group it hosts.

connections.detail: Shared Albanian identity; close political and economic ties
Among the most pro-American states in Europe; hosts MEK exiles
Largest trade partner and migration destination
